texto: Chinese brands will face many obstacles when marketing to Western consumers. Beyond the associations with poor quality and unsound environmental practices, they generally do not have the marketing capabilities or budgets to build powerful global brands.
explicacao: Citação de Nirmalya Kumar sobre temas ligados a negocios. “Chinese brands will face many obstacles when marketing to Western consumers. Beyond the associati…” articula negocios, powerful, quality em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como quality e obstacles.

frase_original: Chinese brands will face many obstacles when marketing to Western consumers. Beyond the associations with poor quality and unsound environmental practices, they generally do not have the marketing capabilities or budgets to build powerful global brands.

texto: Branding is not merely about differentiating products; it is about striking emotional chords with consumers. It is about cultivating identity, attachment, and trust to inspire customer loyalty. Chinese brands score low on attributes such as 'sophisticated,' 'desirable,' 'innovative,' 'friendly,' and 'trustworthy.'
explicacao: Citação de Nirmalya Kumar sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Branding is not merely about differentiating products; it is about striking emotional chords with…” articula motivacao, loyalty, identity em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e termino.

frase_original: Branding is not merely about differentiating products; it is about striking emotional chords with consumers. It is about cultivating identity, attachment, and trust to inspire customer loyalty. Chinese brands score low on attributes such as 'sophisticated,' 'desirable,' 'innovative,' 'friendly,' and 'trustworthy.'
